ticket.subject: Welcome to Shopify Partner PluginHive! We’re here to help you save both time and money
ticket.raw_subject: Welcome to Shopify Partner PluginHive! We’re here to help you save both time and money
ticket.description:
Hello Michael,

 Greeting from Shopify Partner PluginHive!

 Thank you for installing our Shopify App - **“PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App”** on ez90xj-ps.myshopify.com

 Our team would like to assist you with the complete app onboarding.

 We request you let us know a suitable time for the onboarding session, which will not take more than 10 mins. Feel free to reply to this email (or) share your contact number, we will get in touch with you.

 You can also refer our documentation to set up the app and start shipping - click here to know more

 Looking forward to hearing from you.

 Thanks and Regards,
 Team PluginHive
https://www.pluginhive.com/about/#team

comments.body:
Hello Michael,

Greetings from PluginHive!

I am Touseef from the PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label app. Thank you for installing the app again on your store.

Please feel free to reach out if you require any assistance with the app setup.

We can connect over a Zoom call to help you with the app setup and answer your queries. Please let us know your availability for the same.

Hope to hear from you soon.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hi Touseef,



We worked together a while back when I was evaluating the PH MultiCarrier Shipping Label App. I have reinstalled the app and now want to continue with my testing. After I installed the App, it says that I require "FedEx Rest API" now. Just wondering what I need to do to switch over. Currently I have 3 different FedEx Carriers setup in PM.



Thanks

Brad




 ![Sent from Front](https://app.frontapp.com/api/1/noauth/companies/674c4f72639683d07464/seen/msg_336zltyf/han_41ub18p/186c642d.gif)

comments.body:
Hello Brad,

Thank you for your reply.

I have attached a short video explaining how to reconnect your FedEx account. Although there are 3 accounts connected, all 3 are linked to the same FedEx account. They were connected multiple times to handle different duties payment types for different zones.

Please proceed with reconnecting your FedEx account. Once completed, kindly reply to this email, and we will be happy to assist you with updating the automation rules.

Also, please note that if you attempt to connect the account more than 3 times, the FedEx account registration process will be blocked for 24 hours. In that case, you will need to wait 24 hours before trying again.

Please let us know if you need any assistance.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Brad,
 
Thank you for your reply.
 
I have attached a short video explaining how to reconnect your FedEx account. Although there are 3 accounts connected, all 3 are linked to the same FedEx account. They were connected multiple times to handle different duties payment types for different zones.
 
Please proceed with reconnecting your FedEx account. Once completed, kindly reply to this email, and we will be happy to assist you with updating the automation rules.
 
Also, please note that if you attempt to connect the account more than 3 times, the FedEx account registration process will be blocked for 24 hours. In that case, you will need to wait 24 hours before trying again.
 
Please let us know if you need any assistance.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hi Manohar,



I tried to connect our FedEx account, and I know the information is correct but the registration still failed. Maybe it is the format I am entering? Either way, I tried 3 times and failed. Guess I will have to wait until it resets to try again.



I was trying to export 5 products (EKU08306, EKN49417, EKL54207, EKU10053, EKN51164), but I never saw any notifications of an export file being completed. No pop-up or files in my download directory. Is it because we have so many products that it is causing problems?



Best regards,

Brad




 ![Sent from Front](https://app.frontapp.com/api/1/noauth/companies/674c4f72639683d07464/seen/msg_33706s6f/han_41ub18p/8992f4af.gif)
comments.html_body:
Hi Manohar,

I tried to connect our FedEx account, and I know the information is correct but the registration still failed. Maybe it is the format I am entering? Either way, I tried 3 times and failed. Guess I will have to wait until it resets to try again.

I was trying to export 5 products (EKU08306, EKN49417, EKL54207, EKU10053, EKN51164), but I never saw any notifications of an export file being completed. No pop-up or files in my download directory. Is it because we have so many products that it is causing problems?

Best regards,
Brad

comments.body:
Hello Michael,

Please try connecting the account again after 24 hours and check how it goes. Also, please review your recent FedEx invoice to verify that the billing and shipping addresses entered are correct.

If the issue still persists, please share a copy of the invoice with us. We will try connecting the account from our end.

Regarding the product export, your store has more than 78k products, which makes it a very large file. Due to this, exporting the product file directly is not possible. You may need to search for and update the products manually.
If the product CSV export is mandatory, please let us know. We will check internally and see if we can generate the CSV file manually.

Please let us know how it goes or if you need any assistance.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Michael,
 
Please try connecting the account again after 24 hours and check how it goes. Also, please review your recent FedEx invoice to verify that the billing and shipping addresses entered are correct.
 
If the issue still persists, please share a copy of the invoice with us. We will try connecting the account from our end.
 
Regarding the product export, your store has more than 78k products, which makes it a very large file. Due to this, exporting the product file directly is not possible. You may need to search for and update the products manually.
If the product CSV export is mandatory, please let us know. We will check internally and see if we can generate the CSV file manually.
 
Please let us know how it goes or if you need any assistance.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hi Manohar,



The account is under Michael, but I am working on the implementation.



I was looking at a FedEx invoice when entering the data, and also referring to one of our previously connected profiles. I will try again after 24 hours.



There are too many products to update manually, and we will be having a custom's description that is specific to each product, so we will have to complete an export/import to make these corrections. If you could request internally for an export, that would be great.



Before the export, can the product list be simplified at all?

- We have from 1 to 3 variants for each product, increasing the records well above the 78K products that you mentioned
- Do we require the variants in PH, or can the HS Code, CoO, and product value come from Shopify directly

  - And have the customs description assigned to the "Parent" of each product instead of the variant? For example, for our product "EKU08306," do we require the SKU "EKU08306-96T" within PH?

- If you have any recommendations on how we can reduce the number of records in PH, without reducing our total product account, we can see if it's possible?



Best regards,

Brad




 ![Sent from Front](https://app.frontapp.com/api/1/noauth/companies/674c4f72639683d07464/seen/msg_3370ca5j/han_41ub18p/974aff73.gif)
comments.html_body:

There are too many products to update manually, and we will be having a custom's description that is specific to each product, so we will have to complete an export/import to make these corrections. If you could request internally for an export, that would be great.

Before the export, can the product list be simplified at all?
  • We have from 1 to 3 variants for each product, increasing the records well above the 78K products that you mentioned
  • Do we require the variants in PH, or can the HS Code, CoO, and product value come from Shopify directly
    • And have the customs description assigned to the "Parent" of each product instead of the variant? For example, for our product "EKU08306," do we require the SKU "EKU08306-96T" within PH?
  • If you have any recommendations on how we can reduce the number of records in PH, without reducing our total product account, we can see if it's possible?

Best regards,
Brad

comments.body:
Hello Brad,

Sure, please try connecting the FedEx account again after 24 hours using the correct account details and check how it goes.

Regarding the products, you need to update the product variants rather than the parent products, as customers select the variants while placing orders.
Please allow us some more time regarding the product CSV file. We will get back to you with an update soon.

We appreciate your time and patience.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Need assistance from L3 team:

Case: Request for Product CSV File Export

Details:
The MCSL customer has 78k+ products and is looking to update the product descriptions in bulk. They are trying to export the product CSV file, but the export is not completing successfully.

It appears the issue may be related to the large product CSV file size.

Could you please help with exporting the product CSV file?

Store Details:
Store URL - ez90xj-ps.myshopify.com
Account ID - c585d835-c4d1-4622-975d-6eb5135606d5
comments.html_body:

Details:
The MCSL customer has 78k+ products and is looking to update the product descriptions in bulk. They are trying to export the product CSV file, but the export is not completing successfully.
 
It appears the issue may be related to the large product CSV file size.
 
Could you please help with exporting the product CSV file?

Account ID - c585d835-c4d1-4622-975d-6eb5135606d5

comments.body:
Hello Michael,

Thank you for reaching out.

We noticed that your store currently has more than 78,000 products, which results in a very large CSV export size. The current Basic plan is primarily designed for smaller stores and lower-volume catalog operations, so handling very large product exports can be challenging under this plan.

Would you be open to moving to our Enterprise plan ($99/month) so we can better support large catalog operations like bulk product exports and related processing requirements?

Once upgraded, our team can prioritize assistance for the CSV export and ensure smoother handling of large product datasets going forward.

Please let us know your thoughts, and we’ll be happy to assist further.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Michael,
 
Thank you for reaching out.
 
We noticed that your store currently has more than 78,000 products, which results in a very large CSV export size. The current Basic plan is primarily designed for smaller stores and lower-volume catalog operations, so handling very large product exports can be challenging under this plan.
 
Would you be open to moving to our Enterprise plan ($99/month) so we can better support large catalog operations like bulk product exports and related processing requirements?
 
Once upgraded, our team can prioritize assistance for the CSV export and ensure smoother handling of large product datasets going forward.
 
Please let us know your thoughts, and we’ll be happy to assist further.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Good morning,



Yes, we will change our plan before our website goes live. Our estimate is around 300 shipments per month. I just selected the cheapest plan during the setup phase while I do some final testing. When we were evaluating last time, I don't think the Enterprise plan was required. I believe we were using the Popular plan at $29 per month.



If it is not possible to support our full catalog products at this time, I can continue testing without our full products in PH. Can they all be deleted, and then I can start from scratch with a smaller data set?



Best regards,

Brad




 ![Sent from Front](https://app.frontapp.com/api/1/noauth/companies/674c4f72639683d07464/seen/msg_337ci1ev/han_41ub18p/85c9c8a5.gif)
comments.html_body:

Yes, we will change our plan before our website goes live. Our estimate is around 300 shipments per month. I just selected the cheapest plan during the setup phase while I do some final testing. When we were evaluating last time, I don't think the Enterprise plan was required. I believe we were using the Popular plan at $29 per month.

If it is not possible to support our full catalog products at this time, I can continue testing without our full products in PH. Can they all be deleted, and then I can start from scratch with a smaller data set?

Best regards,
Brad

Good morning,  
  Yes, we will change our plan before our website goes live. Our estimate is around 300 shipments per month. I just selected the cheapest plan during the setup phase while I do some final testing. When we were evaluating last time, I don't think the Enterprise plan was required. I believe we were using the Popular plan at $29 per month.  
  If it is not possible to support our full catalog products at this time, I can continue testing without our full products in PH. Can they all be deleted, and then I can start from scratch with a smaller data set?

comments.body:
Hello Brad,

Thank you for your reply.

Yes, you were using the **$29 Popular plan** earlier and have currently selected the **$9 Basic plan**. However, for a catalog size of **78k+ products**, even the Popular plan is not recommended, as handling such a large catalog requires significant resources.

Regarding the products, the app syncs products directly from your Shopify product list. If the current 78k+ products are your actual Shopify catalog, deleting them only within the app is not recommended, as they will automatically sync back. These products are also required for shipping rate calculation and order processing.

If you are planning to update your Shopify catalog by removing the 78k+ products and maintaining a smaller product list for testing, please let us know once the update is completed. We will clear the products in MCSL and import them freshly.

Please let us know how you would like to proceed.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Brad,
 
Thank you for your reply.
 
Yes, you were using the $29 Popular plan earlier and have currently selected the $9 Basic plan. However, for a catalog size of 78k+ products, even the Popular plan is not recommended, as handling such a large catalog requires significant resources.
 
Regarding the products, the app syncs products directly from your Shopify product list. If the current 78k+ products are your actual Shopify catalog, deleting them only within the app is not recommended, as they will automatically sync back. These products are also required for shipping rate calculation and order processing.
 
If you are planning to update your Shopify catalog by removing the 78k+ products and maintaining a smaller product list for testing, please let us know once the update is completed. We will clear the products in MCSL and import them freshly.
 
Please let us know how you would like to proceed.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive
